author: Vertyco
description: Manage AutoMod rules to let users opt out of being pinged, with per-user schedules.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user IDs and their ping schedule preferences per guild.
install_msg: Thank you for installing NoPing! Use `[p]noping` to get started.
short: Let users opt out of being pinged with AutoMod rules and custom schedules.
